'''Aach Een''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] treasure hunter who was friends with [[Oolak Goyl]].

==Biography==
Aach was born on [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of his [[Species/Legends|species]], though he and his parents shortly moved to [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]] on a reclamation problem, and Aach spent much of his childhood sifting through debris, utterly fascinated by the variety of technology from other cultures.

Aach realized that he had reached the limit of information he could obtain via garbage. He joined a local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] where he learned how to survive and underwent basic weapons training. Aach learned to understand foreign cultures perfectly, and could integrate himself like a native without ever arousing suspicion.

After traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Aach applied to several esteemed universities for a job as a historian, though he was rejected over a lack of formal training. Annoyed, he took up a career of collecting historical artifacts by any means necessary, which included grave robbing and stealing from museums.

Sometime along this line of crime Aach met up with [[Oolak Goyl]], who funded all of Aach's excursions for an occasional artifact or piece of information. Aach also managed to obtain a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray-31'']] starship ''[[Unearthed]]'', which he used for his explorations.
